description_long: This radiator features a modern, wall-mounted design with a series of curved, horizontal slats in a vibrant magenta color, supported by vertical brackets. The slats are evenly spaced, creating a visually striking and functional heat-dissipating surface. The radiator is mounted on a flat, rectangular white panel that serves as its backing and likely attaches to the wall. At the lower right corner, two small metallic valve components are visible, suggesting manual control for water flow. The overall construction appears robust, with the slats made of metal and the panel likely metal or coated composite. The design is both decorative and practical, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A modern wall-mounted radiator with curved magenta horizontal slats and visible metallic valves, set on a white rectangular backing panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of magenta horizontal slats, white backing panel, and visible metallic valves at the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's slim profile and the outward curve of the slats from the wall-mounted panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing only the flat white backing panel, with no radiator elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the layered arrangement of the slats.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom right, horizontally oriented
